prompt: We run a large-scale LLM training cluster on GKE Standard with 512 H100 GPU nodes (A3 Mega, 8 GPUs each) using GPUDirect-TCPXO for inter-node communication. Our training runs last 2-3 weeks. We're on GKE 1.31 and need to upgrade to 1.32. How do we do this without destroying an active training run or breaking our GPU interconnect?
